docs: On-chain registry for VM0042 and GSOC reserve proof snapshots.
Off-chain jobs compute the reserve state and anchor the resulting
snapshots here. Snapshot blocks must be strictly monotonic per token
or project.
abi.name: ReserveProofRegistry

docs: Configures the canonical carbon-credit lifecycle contract used for
VM0042 supply reconciliation.
endpoints.name: setCarbonCreditAddr

docs: Configures the canonical buffer-pool reserve contract used for
VM0042 reserve reconciliation.
endpoints.name: setBufferPoolAddr

docs: Anchors a VM0042 reserve proof for a token at a given snapshot block.
endpoints.name: anchorReserveProof

docs: Anchors a GSOC reserve proof for a project at a given snapshot block.
endpoints.name: anchorGsocReserveProof

docs: Verifies that a holder balance belongs to the anchored VM0042 reserve
snapshot Merkle root for the given token and snapshot block.
The proof matches the current off-chain cadence contract exactly:
leaves are `sha256(0x00 || "{index}:{holder_address}:{balance_scaled}")`,
and parent nodes hash `0x01` followed by the lexicographically sorted
lowercase hex child hashes concatenated as ASCII.
endpoints.name: verifyHolderSnapshot

docs: Storage layout version for forward-compatible upgrades.
endpoints.name: getStorageVersion

docs: Proposes the initial governance address during bootstrap, or rotates
governance when called by the currently active governance address.
endpoints.name: setGovernance

docs: Accepts a pending governance transfer before the acceptance window expires.
endpoints.name: acceptGovernance

docs: Cancels bootstrap-time pending governance only while no active
governance has yet been accepted. Once governance is active, control is
irreversible and cannot be revoked back to owner-only.
endpoints.name: revokeGovernance

docs: Reserve proof for the GSOC track.
Reserve proof for the VM0042 track.
